description: Branchless sign, saturating add/sub for Z80 (u8/i8)

sign8.algorithm: neg_mask = (bit7→CY, SBC A,A); nz_mask = (NEG→CY, SBC A,A); result = (nz_mask AND 1) OR neg_mask
sign8.notes: neg→0xFF, zero→0x00, pos→0x01. NEG sets CY iff A≠0.

sat_add8.algorithm: sum = A+B (CY on overflow); mask = SBC A,A (0xFF if overflow); result = mask | sum
sat_add8.notes: If overflow: 0xFF | anything = 0xFF. If no overflow: 0x00 | sum = sum.

sat_sub8.algorithm: diff = A-B (CY on borrow); mask = ~(SBC A,A) (0xFF if no borrow, 0x00 if borrow); result = mask & diff
sat_sub8.notes: If borrow: AND 0x00 = 0. If no borrow: AND 0xFF = diff.

sat_add8_signed.algorithm: If no overflow (P/V clear): sum is correct. If overflow: clamp to +127 if A was positive, -128 if negative.
sat_add8_signed.notes: Uses branch (JP PO). Overflow flag detects signed overflow. Branch version since branchless signed sat is very expensive.
